hero.title: Aditya Chauhan
hero.subtitle: I help businesses grow online — through SEO, paid media, and AI-driven marketing strategies that produce measurable results.

about.text: I specialize in data-driven marketing, combining deep SEO knowledge with high-converting Meta Ads and modern AI workflows. My approach isn't just about traffic—it's about building scalable engines that generate compounding revenue.

skills.name: Search Engine Optimisation
skills.desc: Keyword research, on-page SEO, link building, technical audits and ranking strategy.

skills.name: Meta Ads & Paid Social
skills.desc: Campaign setup, audience targeting, A/B testing, budget optimisation and ROAS tracking.

skills.name: Content & Copywriting
skills.desc: Ad copy, social captions, long-form articles, video scripts and brand messaging.

skills.name: AI Tools & Prompt Engineering
skills.desc: Advanced prompting across ChatGPT, Claude, Midjourney and 10+ AI platforms daily.

skills.name: Social Media Marketing
skills.desc: Platform strategy, organic growth, content calendars, community management and analytics.

skills.name: Marketing Automation
skills.desc: Python & Google Apps Script workflows, automated reporting, CRM integrations.

projects.description: As a Digital Marketing Executive for this fast-growing cloud kitchen & tiffin service, I manage end-to-end Meta Ads, creative strategy, and menu promotions to drive daily subscriptions across Gurugram.
Led complete SEO overhaul for the interior design firm, dramatically improving local search rankings and organic lead generation for premium residential projects.
